It’s already on your phone, but what do you wish would happen more or less of when you open the app. How can it bring you more joy?

The 1st time they cried: GPT-2 XL is too dangerous. How laughable is that now?

The 2nd time they cried: Mythos is too dangerous. Now we have an open Kimi K3. Did anything happen?

Next time, even if there really is a wolf, nobody will care.

A guy named Shin just open-sourced Palantir for free.

It is called OpenPlanter.

Palantir helps governments and giant companies connect scattered data about people, businesses, contracts, and money.

OpenPlanter could give that same power to ordinary people.
